source.title: BSEE Accident Investigation Report - Structural Damage Crane/Coil Tubing Incident

context.region: Gulf of Mexico, Garden Banks Block 506

actions_taken: Injured party evacuated via medevac helicopter at 1010 hours
Onsite incident follow-up investigation conducted by BSEE Lafayette District
Incident scene inspected and photographed by BSEE
G-110 Incident of Non-Compliance issued on 2 April 2024
event.summary: On 20 March 2024 at approximately 0705 hours, a Schlumberger Pump Operator sustained a left shoulder injury (dislocated shoulder and torn labrum) while attempting to jump across a 4-foot gap from the Coil Tubing Control Cabin to the Coil Tubing Reel Platform (approximately 12 feet above deck) during well workover operations on the Helix Q-4000 semisubmersible vessel. The operator lost his footing during the transition and grabbed the Coil Tubing Cabin crash frame with his left hand while falling, sustaining the injury. The operator was wearing fall protection harness with self-retracting lanyard but did not follow the Job Safety Analysis requirement to use a ladder for access.
key_phrases: failed to follow working at heights requirements

threats.name: Operator attempts unauthorized access method (jumping across gap)
Non-compliance with Job Safety Analysis procedures

controls.name: Job Safety Analysis - Working at Heights Procedure
controls.barrier_role: Administrative control requiring use of ladder for platform access
controls.lod_basis: Procedural requirement to prevent unauthorized access methods

supporting_text: The Job Safety Analysis called for the use of a ladder to access the Coil Tubing Guide Counter
The IP failed to follow the Schlumberger working at heights Job Safety Analysis
The IP made the decision to jump from the Coil Tubing Control Cabin to the Coil Tubing Reel Platform

controls.name: Fall Protection Harness with Self-Retracting Lanyard
controls.barrier_role: Personal protective equipment to arrest fall and prevent injury severity
controls.lod_basis: Secondary barrier to mitigate consequences of fall

supporting_text: The IP was wearing a fall protection harness attached with a self-retracting lanyard for vertical fall protection
During the fall, he grabbed the Coil Tubing Cabin crash with his left hand injuring his left shoulder

controls.name: Permit to Work System
controls.barrier_role: Administrative control to authorize and document safe work procedures

supporting_text: BSEE gathered incident related documents including Schlumberger Job Safety Analysis, Schlumberger Permit to Work

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
